programs.title: Mr. Crocodile
programs.desc: Mr. Crocodile and his best friend Daisy cheerfully navigate life with boundless enthusiasm and comical misunderstandings due to his instinctive crocodile logic.

programs.title: PAW Patrol
programs.sub_title: Rescue Knights: Pups Save a Tournament; Rescue Knights: Pups Save the Baby Dragons
programs.desc: The PAW Patrol helps a Mystery Knight and the Princess in disguise win a tournament when Claw and Sparks show up to sabotage the event; the Rescue Knights must save some baby dragons from Claw and reunite them with their mommy.

programs.title: PAW Patrol
programs.sub_title: Pups Save a Lonesome Walrus; Pups Save the Hummy Gummies
programs.desc: Wally the Walrus searches all over Adventure Bay for Cap'n Turbot and turns the town upside-down in the process; everybody loves Helga Humdinger's Hummy Gummy treats, causing Mayor Humdinger to get jealous and steal them all.

programs.title: Rubble & Crew
programs.sub_title: The Crew Builds a Winter Wonderland; The Crew Builds a Giant Snow Squirrely Whirly
programs.desc: Transforming Builder Cove's beach boardwalk into a bright, festive winter wonderland; a snow day gets in the way of Motor and Mix's Super Squirrely Whirly plans.

programs.title: Mr. Crocodile
programs.desc: Winston tries to be the leader on a nature hike, but his high-tech gadget gets everyone lost in the woods; when Daisy skins her knee learning to skateboard, Mr. Crocodile tries to keep her from ever getting another boo-boo.

programs.title: PAW Patrol
programs.sub_title: Moto Pups: Pups Save the Donuts; Moto Pups: Pups Save the Kitties
programs.desc: When the Ruff-Ruff Pack steals Mr. Porter's mini-donut maker, the Moto Pups set off to get the machine back in one piece; the Ruff-Ruff Pack takes over Humdinger's lair and runs off with his kitties.
